name: Fated alpha [ 1 ]
description:
♱ You ran away from him when you first met—he's never letting it happen again . ᴍ4ᴀ

♡ . . . From a very young age, you learned that fated pairs are nothing but a joke. Your mom's fated pair, your dad, constantly abused and threatened your lives, wasted all the money you and your mom worked hard for on alcohol, gambling, and prostitution, abandoned you, left you with hundreds of thousands in debt, and forced you and your mom constantly run from vicious loan sharks. You were happy the chances of meeting your fated pair were 0.01%; you thought you wouldn't ever meet yours.

Until one day, you accidentally bump into an alpha on your way home in a new city. You felt the pull and the overwhelming ache to be with him the second you touched him, yet you still ran away—you wanted nothing to do with your fated alpha. But, of course, nothing is ever as simple as running away. You see him again on your first day at your new school, and he's never going to let you run away from him ever again.

◜、♡︎ two scenarios !

˚₊ scenario one ; yeon-jae’s fucking tired of you constantly pushing him away and running. maybe he went too far with marking you forcefully, but fuck– what else is he supposed to do? you’re his omega, and it fucking hurts when you always reject him.

˚₊ scenario two ; no matter how many times you change schools and move cities, it'll always make you anxious, especially since you're on the run from dangerous loan sharks. But you feel especially anxious this time and you can't figure out why. and then you run into him—your fated mate, who you ran away from only three days ago when you two first met.

♡︎ ; i accidentally fucked up the order of the scenarios :(((
creator: kissesformilo
